title: Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit
Status: Starts July 2026
The Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit (CGEB) will replace the GST/HST credit in July 2026 . Under its new name, the eligibility, payment calculation, and structure will be the same as the GST/HST credit.
The benefit will provide tax-free quarterly payments to individuals and families with low and modest incomes to help manage the rising costs of everyday essentials. Starting in July 2026 , there will be a 25% increase to the benefit amount. This increased amount will remain for 5 years from 2026 to 2031 .
When you file your taxes, you are automatically considered for the benefit and any related provincial and territorial programs .
